title: California Transport Sector Quarterly Trendsheet - Q4 2025
content: Q4 2025 witnessed a decline in overall sales of LDVs in California by 3.03% Year-on-Year (YoY), and EV sales witnessed a fall of 27.00% YoY. Q4 2025 EV penetration fell by 6.20 percentage points on a YoYÂ  basis and a 9.43 percentage points on a QoQ basis. The sharp decline in EV sales in Q4 2025 aligns with the expiration of the federal tax credit of upto $7500 on September 30, 2025 and the Q4 numbers reflect the preâ€‘expiration pull-forward in EV purchases in Q3 2025.
author: Radhika Khandelwal
